name: 37"x1.5" Outdoor Bench Cushion Black - Room Essentials™
description:
This Outdoor Bench Cushion from Room Essentials™ instantly elevate the look and feel of your seating space. Made of 100% recycled polyester with foam filling for plush comfort, this bench cushion is designed in a solid black for a modern, minimal charm. The sewn-seam closure with knife edges and round corners lend a sleek look, while the side ties allow easy attachment. Plus, this water-repellant cushion is resistant to weather and UV rays, making it a perfect choice for patio or garden sofas.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
